creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tarjei Jensen from comment #5)
> Check out if there is a directory called include-fixed in the gcc ports tree.
> That might cause a lot of mischief. Try to rename it.

This should not be necessary any longer; I have adjusted the lang/gcc*
ports to take care of that in September.

rm@, do you still see this, with an up-to-date ports tree (in particular
lang/gcc* ports)?
